info.title: ChatNX
info.author: Jonathan8520
info.description: Chat with AI and generate/analyse images
info.details:
ChatNX turns your Nintendo Switch into an AI companion. It talks to Puter's AI gateway over Wi-Fi, so you chat straight from the console.

Features:
- Chat with multiple AI models (Claude, GPT, and more)
- Generate images from a text prompt, saved to a built-in gallery with a full-screen zoom/pan viewer
- Analyze any Switch screenshot by attaching it to your question
- Voice dictation with a USB microphone
- Live usage and quota tracking, with a per-model cost breakdown
- Wireless setup: scan a QR code to enter your Puter token
- Full interface and AI responses in 28 languages

Requires Atmosphère custom firmware, a Wi-Fi connection, and a free Puter account. Unofficial homebrew, not affiliated with Nintendo.
